prompt: We need your words before fracture welding
prayer:
From the Codex Metallurgicus, Invocation of the Sealing Flame

First: Let the arc-spirit be summoned from the power-conduits.
Second: Guide the molten-heart to bridge the severed flesh of metal.
Third: Invoke the cooling-breath, that the bond may crystallize in strength.

By the Omnissiah's will, let fracture become unity.

prompt: Emergency rite for stuck mechanism freeing
prayer:
Litany of Unsealing, for mechanisms locked in profane stillness

First: Anoint the seized joint with penetrant-oils, whispering the Mantra of Release.
Second: Apply percussive blessing—strike thrice with measured force upon the corroded heart.
Third: Engage the lever-servo with utmost patience, coaxing motion through prayer.

May the Machine Spirit remember its purpose.

prompt: Emergency rite for quality control scanning
prayer:
Prayer of Verification, spoken after the blessed repairs are sealed

First: Activate the oculus-scanner, that hidden flaws be revealed to our sight.
Second: Pass the seeking-beam across every suture and joint with reverent motion.
Third: Record the sacred measurements—let no defect escape the Machine Spirit's judgment.

Truth through inspection, perfection through faith.

prompt: We need your words before power weapon blessing
prayer:
Rite of the Blessed Edge, for weapons destined for war

First: Let the power-core be purified with the Chant of Activation.
Second: Anoint the blade or bolt-chamber with sacred oils, speaking the name of enemies yet vanquished.
Third: Channel the full voltage through dormant circuits, awakening the weapon's wrathful spirit.

Go forth, instrument of the Omnissiah's vengeance.

Emergency Invocation for the Severed Current

First: Silence all systems with the Mantra of Pause, that no surge-spirit remain.
Second: Wait seven heartbeats, allowing the capacitor-hearts to bleed their charge to the aether.
Third: Engage the reset-switch with solemn purpose, restoring the sacred flow.

Let the current return, sanctified and whole.

Blessing of the Descending Plates, for crushing and forming

First: Prime the fluid-channels with the Litany of Pressure, invoking the pneumatic spirits.
Second: Position the workpiece in the embrace of the blessed plates with measured care.
Third: Engage the descent-servo, speaking the Mantra of Compression until resistance becomes virtue.

Through pressure, perfection is born.

prompt: Say something to steady fusion core containment check
prayer:
Rite of the Contained Flame, for the heart of atomic power

First: Recite the Seals of Binding, naming each magnetic field-line that holds the plasma-spirit.
Second: Scan the containment-vessel with the sacred dosimeter, confirming the barriers hold.
Third: Seal the inspection-port with the Oath of Unbroken Faith.

The Omnissiah's chain remains unbroken.

Prayer of True Heights, for instruments that read the sky

First: Calibrate against the blessed reference-standard, that the sensor-spirit know true measure.
Second: Apply the test-stimulus, watching the needle-spirit rise and fall in holy rhythm.
Third: Record the variance-margin, ensuring accuracy within the sacred tolerance.

Let no pilot fly blind where faith and data unite.

prompt: Blessing for logic engine error correction
prayer:
Litany of the Corrected Mind, for thinking-engines gone astray

First: Invoke the Diagnostic Subroutine, that hidden errors be cast into the light.
Second: Speak the Mantra of Purging, erasing corrupt data-chains from the circuit-memory.
Third: Reload the sacred code-sequences, restoring the logic-spirit's clarity.

Through error, we learn the Omnissiah's will.
